events.event: 2017: S/850->S/930 | region x sector | narrow bite | all_formal
events.method: Region x sector bite DiD (ENAHO repeated cross-sections). Outcome = dln(formal employment) by cell. Treatment = pre-reform bite share in [old_min, new_min). Primary spec: WLS with region+sector FE (within estimator). Bootstrap SE clustered by region (500 resamples).
